<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List Promotions"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1beta1/projects/{project}/promotions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List Promotion resources from a project's namespace. Returns a
PromotionList resource.
